para_trans: On the transfer and posting of officers of the Sub-Divisional Magistrate cadre.
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. CHANGE-0526 / P.No.102 / AASTA-2
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk
Reference: - The Maharashtra Regulation of Transfer of Government Employees and Prevention of Delays in the discharge of Government Duties Act, 2005,
2) Government Notification, General Administration Department No. SRV-
Reference No. Under section 19, the Reference Maharashtra Regulation of Transfer of Government Employees and Prevention of Delays in the discharge of Government Duties Act, LOOK has been promulgated.

In accordance with the provisions contained in Section 4 (4) b Section 4 (5) of the Maharashtra Government Employees Regulation of Transfer and Prevention of Delays in the discharge of Government Duties Act, 2005 and with the prior approval of the competent authority, in the interest of public service and administrative convenience, Shri Vishwas Gujjar, Sub Divisional Officer, Kalyan, G. Thane, in the cadre of Deputy Collector is being transferred from his present working position and orders regarding the appointment of Shri Gujjar shall be issued separately.

3. The aforesaid Mr. Gujjar, Sub Divisional Officer, Kalyan dated 07.05.2026 (M. No.) is being unilaterally relieved from the present working position. Accordingly, Mr. Gujjar should immediately join the Additional Chief Secretary (Revenue, Registration & Stamp, Revenue & Forest Department, Mantralaya, Mumbai.

4. Mr. Gujjar should note that in case of non-compliance with the said order, disciplinary action will be taken against him as it is misconduct as the act violates Rule 23 of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Conduct) Rules, 1979.
The decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
